about_bio: I'm a software developer with an interdisciplinary skillset, based in Vancouver. I build full-stack products and interactive experiences, using frameworks like Unity, Flutter and React. I strive to create impactful experiences for users through an iterative design process.
about_exp_qwadra_desc: Software development with C++, React, and ASP.NET. Development of 3D editor, macros, and networking features for Canfit, an [[op]] design app. Combining photogrammetry, [[cnc]] and 3D printing technology.
about_exp_clirio_desc: Developed several cross-platform [[xr]] [[gis]] apps in Unity/C#/.NET, MRTK, Blazor, and Three.js, with rapid prototyping in a startup environment. Built Clirio View, a [[gis]] project management app with Azure cloud features for user data, [[xr]] spatial conferencing calls with SignalR, spatial anchors, and maps.
about_cta: Open to interesting projects — get in touch!
glossary_xr: Extended Reality - VR (Virtual Reality), AR (Augmented Reality), MR (Mixed Reality)
glossary_op: Orthotics & Prosthetics — limb support and replacement devices
glossary_gis: Geographic Information System — mapping and spatial data
glossary_cnc: Computer Numerical Control — automated machine tools for cutting and shaping materials
